case_title: OTANEZ LUIS A DBA LOUS ENGLISH & EUROPEAN AUTOBODY VS MOLYNEAUX MARK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY OTANEZ LUIS A DBA LOUS ENGLISH & EUROPEAN AUTOBODY AS TO DEFENDANT MOLYNEAUX MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
